title: Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments x Aether
description: A lightweight addon for Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments that moves 3 structures into the Aether
body:
This datapack has a single goal: keep the epic hunt for legendaries from _Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments_, while expanding it to a new dimension — **the Aether**.

3 structures got moved, and will now appear **only in the Aether**:

- **Mew’s Final Island**
- **Reshiram & Zekrom’s Dragonspiral Tower**
- **Dialga & Palkia’s Spear Pillar**

Once you’re in the Aether, the **Arc Phone** will localize these structures, just like it does for other structures in other dimensions.

_Requires: Cobblemon: Legendary Monuments 7.x & any version of The Aether 1.21.1 (and all their required dependencies)._
